commands.review_summary:
The branch changes package-manager detection and dependency status so npm-installed package roots with `npm-shrinkwrap.json` are treated as npm while pnpm workspaces with `pnpm-lock.yaml` stay pnpm.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +18. Total +39 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and v2026.5.27 read the `packageManager` field before lockfile markers, while the linked report shows an npm global package root with `npm-shrinkwrap.json` and no `pnpm-lock.yaml` reporting pnpm.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer validation rather than a repair lane: the remaining blocker is real after-fix proof from the actual OpenClaw path plus optional focused test coverage.

target.title: fix(infra): prefer npm-shrinkwrap.json over packageManager field for npm detection
